author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Season 2 Cinematic Trailer | Marathon
Darkness descends on Tau Ceti IV. Season 2 begins June 2. 

Featuring a new map with Night Marsh, a new Runner shell Sentinel, the Cradle, new weapons, progression improvements, and more.

Play Now: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/marathon/9pb32dkqkzdq

Explore the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV, scavenging valuable loot in a high-stakes survival first person shooter from the creators of Halo and Destiny. Infiltrate the dark sci-fi world of Marathon filled with rival players, enemy forces, and unpredictable dangers. Scavenge its maps alone or with a crew, then fight your way to extraction in tense, high-stakes PVP and PVE battles.

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Realm of Ink | Official Launch Trailer
Embark on thrilling battles and explore diverse combinations to craft your unique combat style in this Ink-style action Roguelite adventure!

While pursuing the Fox Demon, the swordswoman Red, unexpectedly finds that her life is dictated by the 'destiny' within the world of the book. Only by breaking free can she unveil the truth of her existence and challenge the constraints of fate.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/realm-of-ink/9pdxqfg5tfj0

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Yerba Buena - Launch Trailer
Use the Oscillator to copy the movement and physical traits of the world around you, reapply them to manipulate the environment and solve inventive puzzles!

Focus Entertainment and developers Mad About Pandas today celebrate the release of their unique puzzle-platforming game, Yerba Buena, out now on XBOX Series X|S! 

Dive into a surreal and abandoned video game world inspired by San Francisco in the 70s, and break out from your role as an NPC to save your friends and city.

Watch Yerba Buena’s Launch Trailer!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/yerba-buena/9NS2M6Z9RNRT

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
World of Tanks: HEAT - Launch Trailer
HEAT is here!
World of Tanks: HEAT is live. The first-ever hero-driven tank action game is open to everyone, free, and ready to play.

Choose your Agent, customize your tank, and ignite the battlefield. Play free now!
